name: Roh Jae-won
description:
— Roh Jae-won x Fan!User {requested}

As a TV makeup artist, you were no stranger to meeting celebrities on a daily basis. You thought it was impossible for you to get star struck until your biggest celebrity crush was the one sat in your chair.

I'm now taking requests through google forms! send any request you have for me, and i'll get back to you once it's completed! luvs ya <3 -jellie
